findings.title: Inconsistent color palette
findings.description: The site uses a dark navy (#1e293b) theme on pricing cards and auth pages, but light/white backgrounds on content pages. The green CTA buttons clash with the blue header bar.
findings.recommendation: Establish a unified design system with a consistent primary/secondary/accent palette across all pages. Use sport-oriented greens and blues harmoniously.

findings.title: Typography hierarchy is weak
findings.description: Headings and body text lack clear size differentiation. Feature cards on the home page use identical font weights making them blend together.
findings.recommendation: Define a clear type scale (e.g., 14/16/20/24/32/48px) with distinct weights for headings vs body. Ensure minimum 16px body text.

findings.title: Hero image is a stock photo from external CDN
findings.description: The hero image is hotlinked from clubmahindra.com — not a Padel Society asset. It could break at any time and adds latency.
findings.recommendation: Use self-hosted, high-quality padel imagery that represents the actual club. Optimize and serve via next/image.

findings.title: Feature cards lack visual icons
findings.description: The 6 feature cards on the homepage are text-only with no icons or illustrations, reducing scannability.
findings.recommendation: Add sport-themed icons (Lucide or custom SVGs) to each feature card to improve visual hierarchy.

findings.title: No footer section
findings.description: The site has no visible footer with quick links, social media, or legal information.
findings.recommendation: Add a comprehensive footer with navigation links, social media icons, contact info, and legal links.

findings.title: Broken Tournaments page (404)
findings.description: The admin sidebar links to /staff/tournaments which returns a 404 Page Not Found error.
findings.recommendation: Either implement the tournaments page or remove the navigation link.

findings.title: No breadcrumb navigation
findings.description: Inner pages lack breadcrumbs, making it difficult to orient within the site hierarchy.
findings.recommendation: Add breadcrumb navigation on all inner pages.

findings.title: 'Book your court' top bar leads to auth-gated page
findings.description: The persistent 'BOOK YOUR COURT' banner links to /player/bookings which requires login. New visitors hit a wall.
findings.recommendation: Show a preview of court availability for unauthenticated users, with a prompt to sign in to complete booking.

findings.title: Admin sidebar labels are misleading
findings.description: The 'Users' section contains Courts, Halls, Courses — not user management. 'Bookings' section has Scores, Rankings — unrelated to bookings.
findings.recommendation: Reorganize admin sidebar into logical groups: Facilities (Courts, Halls), Programs (Courses, Quizzes), Players (Scores, Rankings, Subscriptions), Operations (Complaints, Tournaments).

findings.title: No evidence of mobile-first design
findings.description: Screenshots show desktop-optimized layouts. Pricing cards appear in 3+ columns with no visible breakpoint adaptation. The login split-panel layout would not work well on mobile.
findings.recommendation: Implement mobile-first responsive design with proper breakpoints (sm: 640px, md: 768px, lg: 1024px, xl: 1280px). Stack cards vertically on mobile.

findings.title: Navigation lacks mobile menu
findings.description: The 7-item horizontal navigation has no visible hamburger menu or mobile alternative.
findings.recommendation: Add a responsive hamburger menu for screens below 768px with slide-out or dropdown pattern.

findings.title: Touch targets may be too small
findings.description: Navigation links and small text links (like 'Forgot password?') appear to be under the 44x44px minimum touch target size.
findings.recommendation: Ensure all interactive elements have a minimum 44x44px touch area.

findings.title: Pricing plans contain test/placeholder data
findings.description: Plans named 'test', 'test aaa', 'abonnement Test' with descriptions like 'test0', 'test 1' are visible to public users on the pricing page. This severely damages credibility.
findings.recommendation: Clean up all test data. Display only production-ready plans with clear names, descriptions, and value propositions.

findings.title: Forms lack validation feedback
findings.description: The contact form and auth forms show no inline validation states, error messages, or success feedback.
findings.recommendation: Add real-time inline validation with clear error/success states for all form fields.

findings.title: CTA buttons inconsistent
findings.description: Mixed button styles: outlined ('Learn More'), filled ('Get Started'), and dark navy ('Select plan'). No consistent visual hierarchy.
findings.recommendation: Define primary, secondary, and ghost button variants. Use primary for main CTAs, secondary for alternatives.

findings.title: FAQ section has no answers
findings.description: The Pricing page FAQ section shows 4 questions but the answers are not visible/expandable in the scraped content.
findings.recommendation: Implement an accordion FAQ component with clear expand/collapse interaction and comprehensive answers.

findings.title: All images are hotlinked from external sources
findings.description: Hero image from clubmahindra.com, team photos from pexels.com, court photos from unsplash.com, equipment from various CDNs. These could break, cause CORS issues, and add significant latency.
findings.recommendation: Download, optimize, and self-host all images. Use next/image with automatic WebP/AVIF conversion and lazy loading.

findings.title: No alt text on images
findings.description: The hero image has a template variable '{{ $t('padel-court') }}' as alt text instead of actual descriptive text. Other images lack meaningful alt text.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images for accessibility and SEO.

findings.title: Images are not optimized
findings.description: External images are served in original format (JPEG/PNG) without modern format conversion or responsive sizing.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image to serve images in WebP/AVIF with responsive srcsets and proper lazy loading.

findings.title: No actual club photography
findings.description: All imagery is stock photos — none show the actual Padel Society facilities, courts, or team members.
findings.recommendation: Invest in professional photography of actual facilities. For the redesign, use high-quality padel stock photos as placeholders.

findings.title: No meta tags or Open Graph data
findings.description: Pages lack title tags, meta descriptions, and Open Graph tags. Social sharing would show raw URLs with no preview.
findings.recommendation: Add unique title and meta description to every page. Implement Open Graph (og:title, og:description, og:image) and Twitter Card meta tags.

findings.title: No sitemap.xml or robots.txt
findings.description: No sitemap or robots.txt detected, limiting search engine crawlability.
findings.recommendation: Generate a dynamic sitemap.xml and robots.txt. Use Next.js built-in metadata API.

findings.title: No structured data (JSON-LD)
findings.description: No Schema.org markup for LocalBusiness, SportsActivityLocation, or Offer schemas.
findings.recommendation: Add JSON-LD structured data: LocalBusiness for the club, SportsActivityLocation for courts, Offer for pricing plans, FAQPage for the FAQ section.

findings.title: No canonical URLs
findings.description: Pages lack canonical URL tags, risking duplicate content issues.
findings.recommendation: Add canonical URL tags to all pages.

findings.title: Template variable exposed in production
findings.description: The hero image alt text shows '{{ $t('padel-court') }}' — a Vue.js i18n template variable rendering raw instead of translated.
findings.recommendation: Fix the i18n setup to properly render translated strings, or hardcode alt text.

findings.title: External image dependencies add latency
findings.description: Images loaded from 6+ different external domains (clubmahindra.com, pexels.com, unsplash.com, etc.) require separate DNS lookups and connections, dramatically increasing load time.
findings.recommendation: Self-host all images. Use CDN (Netlify's built-in CDN). Implement proper caching headers.

findings.title: No image optimization pipeline
findings.description: Large unoptimized images served without lazy loading, modern formats, or responsive sizing.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image for automatic optimization: WebP/AVIF format, responsive srcsets, lazy loading, blur placeholders.

findings.title: No visible code splitting or lazy loading
findings.description: The site appears to be a Vue.js SPA that likely loads all routes upfront.
findings.recommendation: Implement route-based code splitting with Next.js App Router. Use dynamic imports for heavy components.

findings.title: OpenStreetMap tiles on contact page
findings.description: Leaflet map loads multiple tile images on the contact page, adding to page weight.
findings.recommendation: Lazy-load the map component. Consider a static map image with click-to-interact pattern.

findings.title: Images lack proper alt text
findings.description: Hero image has broken template variable as alt text. Team photos and court images have generic or missing alt text.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive, meaningful alt text to all images. Use empty alt='' for purely decorative images.

findings.title: No ARIA labels on interactive elements
findings.description: The dark mode toggle, language selector, and hamburger menu (if any) lack ARIA labels for screen readers.
findings.recommendation: Add aria-label to all icon-only buttons. Use proper ARIA roles for interactive widgets.

findings.title: Color contrast concerns
findings.description: Light gray text on white backgrounds (subtitle text) may not meet WCAG 4.5:1 contrast ratio requirements.
findings.recommendation: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios: 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. Use a contrast checker.

findings.title: Form fields lack visible labels
findings.description: Auth forms use placeholder text as labels which disappear on input, making it impossible to verify what field you're filling.
findings.recommendation: Add persistent visible labels above or beside all form fields. Use placeholder text only as example input.

findings.title: No skip navigation link
findings.description: No 'Skip to main content' link for keyboard users to bypass the navigation.
findings.recommendation: Add a visually hidden skip link as the first focusable element on each page.

findings.title: Admin credentials are weak defaults
findings.description: The admin account uses a simple password 'AdminPass123!' that follows a predictable pattern.
findings.recommendation: Enforce strong password policies. Implement 2FA for admin accounts. Change default credentials.

findings.title: No visible CSP headers
findings.description: Content Security Policy headers are likely missing, allowing potential XSS attacks with content from 6+ external domains.
findings.recommendation: Implement strict Content-Security-Policy headers. Whitelist only necessary external domains.

findings.title: Contact form lacks CSRF/spam protection
findings.description: The contact form has no visible CAPTCHA, honeypot, or rate limiting.
findings.recommendation: Add reCAPTCHA or hCaptcha. Implement server-side rate limiting and CSRF tokens.

findings.title: Social login (Google/Facebook) implementation unknown
findings.description: OAuth buttons are present but security of the implementation cannot be verified from scraping alone.
findings.recommendation: Ensure OAuth follows best practices: state parameter, PKCE flow, proper token storage.

findings.title: Test/placeholder data visible to public
findings.description: Pricing page shows plans named 'test', 'test aaa' with features like 'test0', 'test 1'. This is production-damaging content.
findings.recommendation: Audit all CMS/admin content. Remove test data. Create proper plan names (Starter, Pro, Premium) with real feature descriptions.

findings.title: Inconsistent language
findings.description: Site is in English but admin area shows French ('Accueil', 'janv.', 'févr.', 'Mot de passe'). Login page mix shows both languages.
findings.recommendation: Fully implement i18n with proper EN/FR translations. Ensure consistent language per user preference.

findings.title: Missing operating hours
findings.description: No operating hours displayed anywhere on the public site, despite courts having different schedules (05:00-23:00, 08:00-17:00, etc.).
findings.recommendation: Display operating hours prominently on the contact page and in the footer.

findings.title: No testimonials or social proof
findings.description: Despite claiming 500+ active members, there are zero testimonials, reviews, or social proof on the site.
findings.recommendation: Add a testimonials section with member quotes, ratings, or partner logos.

findings.title: No analytics tracking detected
findings.description: No Google Analytics, Plausible, or other analytics scripts found in the scraped output.
findings.recommendation: Implement privacy-respecting analytics (Plausible or GA4) with conversion tracking for bookings and signups.

findings.title: No error monitoring
findings.description: No Sentry, LogRocket, or similar error tracking detected.
findings.recommendation: Set up error monitoring to catch runtime errors, especially on booking and payment flows.

findings.title: No privacy policy
findings.description: The site collects personal data (registration, contact forms) but has no privacy policy page.
findings.recommendation: Create a comprehensive privacy policy page detailing data collection, usage, storage, and user rights.

findings.title: No terms of service
findings.description: Registration requires accepting 'terms and conditions' but no link to actual terms is provided.
findings.recommendation: Draft and publish terms of service covering membership, booking, cancellation, and liability.

findings.title: No cookie consent banner
findings.description: No cookie consent mechanism despite likely using session cookies and potentially third-party cookies (Google/Facebook OAuth).
findings.recommendation: Implement a GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with granular control.
